# Generated by openai (gpt-4o)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    env:
      CACHE_VERSION: v1

    steps:
    - name: Checkout code
      uses: actions/checkout@v3

    - name: Set up Node.js
      uses: actions/setup-node@v3
      with:
        node-version: '14'

    - name: Set up Python
      uses: actions/setup-python@v4
      with:
        python-version: '3.8'

    - name: Cache Node.js dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      with:
        path: |
          node_modules
          **/package-lock.json
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

    - name: Install Node.js dependencies
      run: npm install

    - name: Cache pip dependencies
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.cache/pip
          **/requirements.txt
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

    - name: Install Python dependencies
      run: pip install -r requirements.txt

    - name: Build the project
      run: |
        npm run build

    - name: Cache build outputs
      uses: actions/cache@v3
      with:
        path: |
          dist
          build
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package.json') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
